snippet.title: Adham Nabulsi - Khayef (Official Music Video) | ШЈШҜЩҮЩ… ЩҶШ§ШЁЩ„ШіЩҠ - Ш®Ш§ЩҠЩҒ
snippet.description:
Adham Nabulsi - Khayef (Official Music Video) | ШЈШҜЩҮЩ… ЩҶШ§ШЁЩ„ШіЩҠ - Ш®Ш§ЩҠЩҒ

Adham Nabulsi 
Khayef

Written, Composed and Arranged by Adham Nabulsi 
Mix & Mastering by RedRamp
Piano & Guitars : Joseph Demerjian 
Bass : Bilal Kalayciogullari
Strings : Istanbul Strings

Produced by AL Production
ArtistвҖҷs Manager Josiane El Khoury

Imagery and Concept by Adham Nabulsi 
Directed by Omar Rammal

Lyrics:

Ш№ ЩӮШҜ Щ…Ш§ ШЁШӯШЁЩғ
Ш®Ш§ЩҠЩҒ ШӘЩғЩҲЩҶЩҠ
Щ…Ш§ ШЁШӘШӯШЁЩҠЩҶЩҠ
Щ…Ш§ ШЁШӘШӯШЁЩҠЩҶЩҠ
ЩҲШ®Ш§ЩҠЩҒ Ш§ЩғЩҲЩҶ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§Ш®Шұ
Ш¶ЩҠШ№ШӘ ШіЩҶЩҠЩҶЩҠ
Ш¶ЩҠШ№ШӘ ШіЩҶЩҠЩҶЩҠ

Ш®Ш§ЩҠЩҒ ШЁЩғШұШ§ ЩҠЩғЩҲЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ ШҜЩҲЩҶЩғ
ЩҲШ®Ш§ЩҠЩҒ Ш§ШөШӯЩү ЩҒЩҠ ЩҠЩҲЩ…
Щ…Ш§ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩӮЩҠ Ш№ЩҠЩҲЩҶЩғ
Ш№ ЩӮШҜ Щ…Ш§ ШЁШӯШЁЩғ
Ш®Ш§ЩҠЩҒ ШӘЩғЩҲЩҶЩҠ Щ…Ш§ ШЁШӘШӯШЁЩҠЩҶЩҠ

ШӯШЁЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щғ ЩҮЩҲ Ш§Щ„Ш®Щ„Ш§ЩҶЩҠ
Ш§ЩғШӘШұ ШЁЩҶЩҠ Ш§ШҜЩ… Ш§ЩҶШ§ЩҶЩҠ
ШЁШҜЩҠ Ш§ЩҠШ§ЩғЩҠ ШӘШ¶Щ„ЩҠ ЩӮШҜШ§Щ…ЩҠ
ЩҲШӘЩҶШіЩҠ ЩғЩ„ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Ші
ЩҲЩ„ЩҲ Щ…Ш§ ЩғШ§ЩҶШӘ Ш§ЩҠШ§Щ…ЩҠ
ЩғЩ„ЩҮШ§ Щ…Ш№Щғ ШӯШӘЩү ЩҲШ§ШӯЩ„Ш§Щ…ЩҠ
ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ЩғЩҶШӘ Ш§ЩҶШ§ ШӯШҜШ§ ШӘШ§ЩҶЩҠ 
ЩҲЩ…Ш§ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩҠ Ш§ШӯШіШ§Ші

Ш®Ш§ЩҠЩҒ ШЁЩғШұШ§ ЩҠЩғЩҲЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ ШҜЩҲЩҶЩғ
ЩҲШ®Ш§ЩҠЩҒ Ш§ШөШӯЩү ЩҒЩҠ ЩҠЩҲЩ…
Щ…Ш§ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩӮЩҠ Ш№ЩҠЩҲЩҶЩғ
Ш№ ЩӮШҜ Щ…Ш§ ШЁШӯШЁЩғ
Ш®Ш§ЩҠЩҒ ШӘЩғЩҲЩҶЩҠ Щ…Ш§ ШЁШӘШӯШЁЩҠЩҶЩҠ

Follow Adham Nabulsi on: 

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/adham.nabulsi
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/adhamnabulsi/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/AdhamNabulsi

Digital Distribution: CHBK Music

snippet.title: Perseverance RoverвҖҷs Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Billie Eilish - ilomilo (Live From The Film вҖ“ Billie Eilish: The WorldвҖҷs A Little Blurry)
snippet.description:
Listen to вҖңilomiloвҖқ (Live From The Film вҖ“ Billie Eilish: The WorldвҖҷs A Little Blurry): https://smarturl.it/ilomiloLive

Witness the incredible rise of Billie Eilish in "Billie Eilish: The WorldвҖҷs A Little BlurryвҖқ as she tours and records the album that changes her life. Watch on Apple TV+ February 26: https://apple.co/_BillieEilishDocвҖӢ

"Billie Eilish: The WorldвҖҷs A Little BlurryвҖқ tells the true coming-of-age story of the singer-songwriter and her rise to global superstardom. From award-winning filmmaker R.J. Cutler, the documentary offers a deeply intimate look at this extraordinary teenagerвҖҷs journey, at just seventeen years old, navigating life on the road, on stage, and at home with her family, while writing, recording and releasing her debut album вҖңWHEN WE ALL FALL ASLEEP, WHERE DO WE GO?вҖқ

The documentary is from Apple Original Films, in association with Interscope Films, Darkroom, This Machine and Lighthouse Management & Media. Directed by R.J. Cutler and starring Billie Eilish, Finneas OвҖҷConnell, Maggie Baird, and Patrick OвҖҷConnell as themselves.

Follow Billie Eilish:

snippet.title: ЩҒЩ„ЩҲЩӮ Ш№Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ© ШӘШ¬Щ…ЩҠЩ„ Ш§ЩҶЩҒЩҠ ШЁШ§Щ…ШұЩҠЩғШ§ рҹҸҘ  рҹ’ү
snippet.description:
Ш№Щ…Щ„ШӘ Ш№Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ© ЩҲЩғЩҶШӘ ШЁШ§Щ„Щ…ШҙЩҒЩү ЩҲЩҮШ°Ш§ ШіШЁШЁ ШәЩҠШ§ШЁЩҠ Ш№ЩҶЩғЩ… Ш§ШҙШӘЩӮШӘЩ„ЩғЩ… ЩғШ«ЩҠШұ ЩғШ«ЩҠШұ ЩғШ«ЩҠШұ ЩҲШ§ШӯШЁЩғЩ… Ш§ЩғШ«Шұ Щ…Щ…Ш§ ШЁШӘШӘШөЩҲШұЩҲШ§ ШӘШұЩӮШЁЩҲШ§ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШІШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠ ЩҲШӘЩҒШ§ШөЩҠЩ„ Ш§ЩғШ«Шұ Ш№ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ© ШЁШ§Щ„ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ§ШҜЩ… - Щ„Ш§ ШӘЩҶШіЩҲШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ЩҠЩғ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ШҙШӘШұШ§Щғ ШЁШ§Щ„ЩӮЩҶШ§Ш© ЩҲЩҒШ№Щ„ЩҲШ§ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШұШі Щ„ШӘШҙЩҲЩҒЩҲШ§ ЩғЩ„ШҙЩҠ ЩӮШ§ШҜЩ… :) 
Ш§ШіЩ… ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұЩҠ ЩҮЩҲ : drkassir
ЩҲЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§ЩҶШіШӘШәШұШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ Щ„Щ„ШЁЩҶШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ШӯШ§ШЁЩҠЩҶ ЩҠШҙЩҲЩҒЩҲШ§ ШҙШәЩ„Ш© ЩҲЩҠШ№ШұЩҒЩҲШ§ ШӘЩҒШ§ШөЩҠЩ„ Ш№ЩҶЩҮ : 
https://www.instagram.com/drkassir/
ШӘШ§ШЁШ№ЩҲЩҶЩҠ ШЁШ§ЩҶШіШӘШәШұШ§Щ… Щ„ЩғЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§ШөЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШӯШөШұЩҠШ© ЩҮШ°Ш§ ШұШ§ШЁШ· ШӯШіШ§ШЁЩҠ : https://www.instagram.com/noorstars/
ШӯШіШ§ШЁЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘЩҠЩғ ШӘЩҲЩғ Ш№Щ…Щ„ШӘ ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲЩҮШ§ШӘ Ш№ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ© ШӯШөШұЩҠШ§ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘЩҠЩғ ШӘЩҲЩғ : https://vm.tiktok.com/ZMeLKyBYM/

snippet.title: Watch NASAвҖҷs Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover вҖ“ the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space вҖ“ search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASAвҖҷs Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.description:

рҹ’« http://tiny.cc/F5M рҹ’«

 ШЁЩҗШіЩҖЩ…Щҗ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮЩҗ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ Щ„Ш§ ЩҠЩҺШ¶ЩҸЩҖШұЩ‘ЩҸ Щ…ЩҺШ№ЩҺ Ш§ШіЩ…ЩҗЩҖЩҮЩҗ ШҙЩҺЩҠШЎЩҢ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈШұЩ’Ш¶Щҗ ЩҲЩҺЩ„Ш§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ‘Щ…ЩҖШ§ШЎЩҗ ЩҲЩҺЩҮЩҖЩҲЩҺ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ‘Щ…ЩҖЩҠШ№ЩҸ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҺЩ„ЩҖЩҠЩ….

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32вҖҷ to tie at one and added two more in the 65вҖҷ and 85вҖҷ. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70вҖҷ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27вҖҷ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

snippet.title: CHUNG HA мІӯн•ҳ 'Bicycle' MV
snippet.description:
CHUNG HA мІӯн•ҳ 'Bicycle' MV

Stream/ Download 'Bicycle' : https://ffm.to/chungha_bicycle
Subscribe CHUNG HA : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9Gxb0gMCh3EPIDLQXeQUog

CHUNG HA The 1st Studio Album [ Querencia ] 'Bicycle'

With the strong fuzz guitar intro this song expresses the excitement and overwhelming energy of going forward by stepping on the pedal with R&B pop-trap sounds.
The straightforward lyrics in the chorus that lead to вҖңGet out of my way-ah! / IвҖҷll show you how I like itвҖқ and the unhindered attitude stamps a seal on her irreplaceable presence as an independent and energetic solo artist. 

к°•л ¬н•ң нҚјмҰҲ кё°нғҖмқҳ лҸ„мһ…л¶ҖмҷҖ н•Ёк»ҳ м „к°ңлҗҳлҠ” R&B нҢқ-нҠёлһ© мӮ¬мҡҙл“ңмҷҖ н•Ёк»ҳ нҺҳлӢ¬мқ„ л°ҹм•„ м•һмңјлЎң лӮҳм•„к°ҖлҠ” мҲңк°„мқҳ м„Өл ҳкіј лІ…м°¬ м—җл„Ҳм§ҖлҘј н‘ңнҳ„н•ҙлӮё кіЎ. вҖңGet out of my way-ah! / ліҙм—¬мӨ„кІҢ how I like itвҖқлЎң мқҙм–ҙм§ҖлҠ” мҪ”лҹ¬мҠӨ нҢҢнҠёмқҳ м§Ғм„ м Ғмқё к°ҖмӮ¬мҷҖ кұ°м№Ём—ҶлҠ” м• нӢ°нҠңл“ңлҠ” лҸ…лҰҪм Ғмқҙкі лҸ„ м—җл„Ҳм§Җ л„ҳм№ҳлҠ” мҶ”лЎң м•„нӢ°мҠӨнҠёлЎңм„ңмқҳ мһҗмӢ к°җкіј к·ё лҲ„кө¬лҸ„ лҢҖмІҙн•  мҲҳ м—ҶлҠ” мЎҙмһ¬к°җмқ„ к°ҒмқёмӢңнӮЁлӢӨ.


[ CHUNG HA 'Bicycle' Credits ]

Lyrics by VINCENZO, CHUNG HA
Composed by Daniel Kim, Jeremy G (Future Sound), Dawn Elektra
Arranged by Daniel Kim, VINCENZO

Synthesizer Performed by Daniel Kim, VINCENZO
Bass Performed by Daniel Kim, VINCENZO
Guitar Performed by Daniel Kim, VINCENZO
Drum Performed by Daniel Kim, VINCENZO
Background Vocals by Emily Yeonseo Kim, Dawn Elektra
Vocal Directed by Fuxxy, VINCENZO

Recording Engineer Jung Eunkyeng at Ingrid Studio
Mixing Engineer  Yoon Wonkwon at Studio DDeepKick
Mastering Engineer Park Jung-Un at Honey Butter Studio

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure SupermanвҖҷs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

 Marwan Khoury - Mahlan Ala Qalbi (Exclusive) | 2021

ЩғЩ„Щ…Ш§ШӘ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӯШ§ЩҶ Щ…ШұЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШұЩҠ
ШӘЩҲШІЩҠШ№ ЩҲЩ…ЩҠЩғШіШ§Ш¬ ШҜШ§ЩҶЩҠ Ш®ЩҲШұЩҠ

Ш§Щ„ЩғЩ„Щ…Ш§ШӘ:
Щ…ЩҮЩ„Ш§ЩӢ Ш№Щ„Щү ЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ                  

ЩҲШұЩ…Щү Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҶШ§ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„Ш§Щ…Щ’                             
ЩҲЩ…Ш¶Щү Щ…ЩҶ ШҜЩҲЩҶЩҗ ЩғЩ„Ш§Щ…Щ’
ЩҲЩғШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§ ЩҠЩӮШөЩҗШҜЩҸ
ШЁШ§Щ„Щ„ШӯШёЩҗ ЩӮШӘЩ„ЩҺЩҶЩҺШ§
ЩҲШӯШҜЩҮЩҸ Щ…ЩҶ ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҶШ§Щ…Щ’
ЩҠЩҲЩӮШё Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ„ЩҸЩ…ЩҺ ЩҲЩҠЩҶШ§Щ…Щ’
ЩҲЩғШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§ ЩҠШұШөЩҸШҜЩҸ
ШЁШ§Щ„ЩҶШЈЩҠЩҗ ЩҲШөЩ„ЩҺЩҶШ§

Щ…ЩҮЩ„Ш§ЩӢ Ш№Щ„Щү ЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ
ШұЩҸШӯЩ…Ш§Щғ ЩҠШ§ ШіЩҠШҜЩҠ
Ш®Ш° ШЁЩҠШҜЩҠ
ЩҒШ§Щ„ШӯШЁЩ‘ЩҸ ЩғШ§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШӘЩҗ
ЩҠШЈШӘЩҠ ШЁЩ„Ш§ Щ…ЩҲШ№ШҜЩҗ.

ЩҲШҘЩҶЩҠ ШіШ№ЩҠШҜЩҢ Ш§ЩҶЩғ ЩӮШ§ШӘЩ„ЩҠ
ЩҒШЈЩҶШӘ Щ…Щ„ЩғШӘЩҶЩҠ ЩғЩ„Щ‘ЩҠ
ЩҲШ§ЩҶШӘЩҺ Ш№Щ…ШұЩҠ ЩҲШіЩҠЩ‘ШҜЩҸ ШЈЩ…ШұЩҠ
ЩҲЩғЩ„Щ‘ЩҸ Щ…Ш§ Щ„ЩғЩҺ Щ„ЩҠ
ЩҲШӯЩҺЩҠЩҺШ§ШӘЩҠ ШҘЩҶ Ш№ШҙШӘЩҮШ§ ЩҒЩ„ЩҺЩғЩ’
ЩҲШҙЩ…ШіЩҠ Ш§ЩҶШӘ ЩҲШ№ШҙЩӮЩғ ЩҒЩ„ЩғЩ’
ЩҒЩғЩҠЩҒ Ш§ШҙЩғЩҲ Щ…ЩҲШӘЩҠ
Щ„Щ…ЩҶ ШӯЩҠШ§ШӘЩҠ Щ…Щ„ЩғЩ’

Щ…ЩҮЩ„Ш§ЩӢ Ш№Щ„Щү ЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ 
ШұЩҸШӯЩ…Ш§Щғ ЩҠШ§ ШіЩҠШҜЩҠ
Ш®Ш° ШЁЩҠШҜЩҠ
ЩҒШ§Щ„ШӯШЁЩ‘ЩҸ ЩғШ§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШӘЩҗ
ЩҠШЈШӘЩҠ ШЁЩ„Ш§ Щ…ЩҲШ№ШҜЩҗ.

snippet.title: Dodge Challenger Demon v Porsche 911 Turbo S - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

ItвҖҷs time for an almighty USA vs Germany drag race! 

MatвҖҷs in the absolutely huge Dodge Challenge Demon, and heвҖҷs lining up against Yianni in the Porsche 911 Turbo S! 

When you compare them on paper, it looks like the Dodge has it in the bag. With a humungous 6.2-litre supercharged V8 under its massive bonnet, the Challenge Demon can put down 808hp and 972Nm! As a result, it seemingly dwarfs the 911 Turbo S, which has a 3.8-litre twin-turbo flat-six, which can produce 650hp & 800Nm. 

But of course, this isnвҖҷt the first time weвҖҷve driven a Porsche 911 Turbo S on this channel, and we know youвҖҷre pretty much guaranteed a 1/4 mile time of less than 10.5 seconds! 

So how do you think this will play out? Will the Dodge be able to put its power down? Or is the Porsche set to grab another victory? 

YouвҖҷll have to keep watching to find out!

Thanks to CS Panda for lending us the Dodge - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCxwBVsAoWWkQjKmSKOx5u2A

.............................................................

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - We're Good (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
The official music video for Dua Lipa - We're Good

Stream WeвҖҷre Good: https://dualipa.co/WereGood

Taken from the Moonlight Edition of Dua Lipa's second studio album 'Future Nostalgia' released in 2020, which featured the hit singles 'Don't Start Now', 'Physical', 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' & 'Levitating'

Get the album Future Nostalgia (The Moonlight Edition): https://dualipa.co/FN-MoonlightEdition

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-KZfRV8c13fOCkhXdLiQ?sub_confirmation=1

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLNrotoZZ8BaoXT_LJuwEyESQlctWNDCwD

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLNrotoZZ8BaouNABcO_A9Xkn_Nkz0PT11

Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook

Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube

Directed by Vania Heymann and Gal Muggia
Produced by Iconoclast
Executive Producer: Natan Schottenfels
Director of Photography: Marcell Rev and Santiago Gonzalez
VFX by: Vania Heymann and Tal Baltuch
Color & Title Design: Tal Baltuch

Rig & Lobster Animation: David Beran

Assistant Choreographer: Alex Clark

Art Director Shelter: Misha Levchenko, Aleksey Velichko, Vlad Tymchenko

Dua Lipa Team-
Stylist: Lorenzo Posocco
Stylist Assistant: Juan Zenon
Make Up: Samantha Lau
Hair: Anna Cofone
Tailor: Luis Cascante
BTS: Bryan Berrios, Tyrell Hampton
DuaвҖҷs Assistant: Nawal Alkhedairy
Transportation: Larry Vesquez

Lyrics:
IвҖҷm on an island
Even when youвҖҷre close
CanвҖҷt take the silence
IвҖҷd rather be alone
I think itвҖҷs pretty plain and simple
We gave it all we could
ItвҖҷs time I wave goodbye from the window
LetвҖҷs end this like we should and say weвҖҷre good

WeвҖҷre not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So letвҖҷs at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when youвҖҷre with somebody else
As long as you swear you wonвҖҷt be pissed when I do it myself 
LetвҖҷs end it like we should and say weвҖҷre good

No need to hide it 
Go get what you want
This wonвҖҷt be a burden if we both donвҖҷt hold a grudge
I think itвҖҷs pretty plain and simple
We gave it all we could
ItвҖҷs time I wave goodbye from the window
LetвҖҷs end this like we should and say weвҖҷre good

WeвҖҷre not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So letвҖҷs at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when youвҖҷre with somebody else
As long as you swear you wonвҖҷt be pissed when I do it myself 
LetвҖҷs end it like we should and say weвҖҷre good

Now youвҖҷre holding this against me
Like I knew you would
I tried my best to make this easy
So donвҖҷt give me that look just say weвҖҷre good

WeвҖҷre not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So letвҖҷs at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when youвҖҷre with somebody else
As long as you swear you wonвҖҷt be pissed when I do it myself 
LetвҖҷs end it like we should and say weвҖҷre good

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'. 

#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #MoonlightEdition

snippet.title: Hog Mountain Challenge Is On! (Clash Of Clans Lunar New Year Special)
snippet.description:
Do you have what it takes to conquer the mighty Golden Dragon and beat the Hog Mountain challenge? Earn 2 Builder Potions, Gems and Resources by scoring 3 stars in one attack during this Lunar New Year special event! 

Featuring: the Warrior King skin, the brand new Hog Mountain scenery, the Wall Breaker decoration, and the Lucky Shrub seasonal obstacle. Also a blast from the past: the Warrior Queen skin! 



Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter в–ә https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram в–әhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook в–әhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-Вӯfilled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

ParentвҖҷs Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

#clashofclans #lunarnewyear #hogmountain #warriorking

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | LIVERPOOL 1-4 CITY
snippet.description:

To watch a full 90-minute replay of the game, visit: https://www.mancity.com/citytv/city-plus

snippet.title: ШҙЩҲЩҒ ЩҠЩҲШіЩҒ ЩҲШіШ§ШұШ© ШЁЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮЩҲШ§ Ш§Щ„ШӯШұШ§Щ…ЩҠШ© ШҘШІШ§ЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Ш§ШұШ©.. ШөШұЩҠШ® Ш¶ШӯЩғ#ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ
snippet.description:
ШҙЩҲЩҒ ЩҠЩҲШіЩҒ ЩҲШіШ§ШұШ© ШЁЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮЩҲШ§ Ш§Щ„ШӯШұШ§Щ…ЩҠШ© ШҘШІШ§ЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Ш§ШұШ©.. ШөШұЩҠШ® Ш¶ШӯЩғ#ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ 

Ш¬ШІШЎ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ„ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„ШұШ§ШЁШ№Ш© Ш№ШҙШұ Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ #ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ
ШЁШ·ЩҲЩ„Ш© :  ШЁШ·ЩҲЩ„Ш© ШҙЩҠЩ…Ш§ШЎ ШіЩҠЩҒШҢ ЩҮШҙШ§Щ… Ш¬Щ…Ш§Щ„ШҢ Ш№Щ…ШұЩҲ ЩҲЩҮШЁШ©ШҢ ШҜЩ„Ш§Щ„ Ш№ШЁШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШІЩҠШІШҢ Щ„ЩҠЩ„Щү ШЈШӯЩ…ШҜ ШІШ§ЩҮШұШҢ Щ„ЩҠЩ„Щү Ш№ШІ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШұШЁШҢ ЩҲШ№ШҜШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Ш¶ЩҠЩҲЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШҙШұЩҒ 
ЩҠШ№ШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§Ш№ЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ§Щ„ЩҠШ©
 ШҢ.
ЩӮЩҶШ§Ш© cbc Ш№ШұШ¶ ШЈЩҲЩ„ 8 Щ…ШіШ§ШЎ
ШҘШ№Ш§ШҜШ© 2:30 ШөШЁШ§ШӯШ§ШҢ 12 ШёЩҮШұШ§
ЩӮЩҶШ§Ш© cbc ШҜШұШ§Щ…Ш§ 11Щ…ШіШ§ШЎ
ЩҲШҘШ№Ш§ШҜШ© 5 ШөШЁШ§ШӯШ§ШҢ ЩҲ2 ШёЩҮШұШ§
ШӘШҜЩҲШұ ШЈШӯШҜШ§Ш« Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§ ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘШҢ ШӯЩҲЩ„ ШЈШіШұШ© ШҙШ§ШЁШ© Щ…ЩғЩҲЩҶШ© Щ…ЩҶ ШІЩҲШ¬ ЩҲШІЩҲШ¬Ш© ЩҲЩҠШ№Щ…Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШІЩҲШ¬ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩғЩҶЩҲЩ„ЩҲШ¬ЩҠШ§ШҢ ЩҒЩҠЩӮЩҲЩ… ШЁШ§Ш®ШӘШұШ§Ш№ Ш№ШҜШҜ Щ…ЩҶ В«Ш§Щ„ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘВ»ШҢ ЩҲШӘЩӮШұШұ Ш§Щ„ШІЩҲШ¬Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШ¬ШіШҜ ШҜЩҲШұЩҮШ§ Щ„ЩҠЩ„Щү ШІШ§ЩҮШұ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ№Ш§ЩҶШ© ШЁШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҠШҙ Щ…Ш№ЩҮЩ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШІЩ„ШҢ ЩҠЩӮЩ„ШЁ ШӯЩҠШ§ШӘЩҮЩ… ШұШЈШіЩӢШ§ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш№ЩӮШЁ ЩҒЩҠ ШҘШ·Ш§Шұ ЩғЩҲЩ…ЩҠШҜЩҠ.
ШҙШ§ЩҮШҜ Щ…ЩӮШ§Ш·Ш№ Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ #ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ:  


 #2021 #ШҙЩҠЩ…Ш§ШЎ_ШіЩҠЩҒ #ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ
ШӘШЈЩ„ЩҠЩҒ : ШЈШӯЩ…ШҜ Щ…ШӯЩҠЩҠ ЩҲ Щ…ШӯЩ…ШҜ Щ…ШӯЩ…ШҜЩҠ 
ШҘШ®ШұШ§Ш¬ : ЩҲЩ„ЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ„ЩҒШ§ЩҲЩҠ
ШҘЩҶШӘШ§Ш¬ : Synergy #Synergy ШӘШ§Щ…Шұ Щ…ШұШіЩҠ
ШҙШұЩғШ© ШіЩҠЩҶШұШ¬Щү Щ„Щ„Ш§ЩҶШӘШ§Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩ„ЩҠЩҒШІЩҠЩҲЩҶЩү ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіЩҠЩҶЩ…Ш§ШҰЩү ЩҲШ®ШҜЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШҘШ№Щ„Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш©

snippet.description:
Witness the incredible rise of Billie Eilish in "Billie Eilish: The WorldвҖҷs A Little BlurryвҖқ as she tours and records the album that changes her life. Watch on Apple TV+ February 26: https://apple.co/_BillieEilishDoc 

"Billie Eilish: The WorldвҖҷs A Little BlurryвҖқ tells the true coming-of-age story of the singer-songwriter and her rise to global superstardom. From award-winning filmmaker R.J. Cutler, the documentary offers a deeply intimate look at this extraordinary teenagerвҖҷs journey, at just seventeen years old, navigating life on the road, on stage, and at home with her family, while writing, recording and releasing her debut album вҖңWHEN WE ALL FALL ASLEEP, WHERE DO WE GO?вҖқ 

The documentary is from Apple Original Films, in association with Interscope Films, Darkroom, This Machine and Lighthouse Management & Media. Directed by R.J. Cutler and starring Billie Eilish, Finneas OвҖҷConnell, Maggie Baird, and Patrick OвҖҷConnell as themselves. 

Song:
вҖңbury a friendвҖқ by Billie Eilish http://apple.co/buryafriend

snippet.description:
Ш§ШіЩ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШұЩҲШ№

ШЁЩҠЩҲШӘ ШҘЩҠЩҲШ§ШЎ Щ„Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШҰЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҲШұЩҠЩҠЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ ШҙЩ…Ш§Щ„ ШіЩҲШұЩҠШ§ 
https://alnouri.org/59074

Щ…Ш§ ШҙШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮрҹҳӯШ¬ШЁЩҶШ§ Ш§Щ„10ШЈЩ„Ш§ЩҒ ШҜЩҠЩҶШ§Шұ(30ШЈЩ„ЩҒ ШҜЩҲЩ„Ш§Шұ) ШЁШЈЩҲЩ„ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘЩҠЩҶ
 ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӯЩ…ШҜЩ„Щ„ЩҮвқӨпёҸвқӨпёҸвқӨпёҸрҹҷҸрҹҸҪ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ ЩҠШ¬Ш№Щ„ЩҮШ§ ШЁЩ…ЩҠШІШ§ЩҶ ШӯШіЩҶШ§ШӘЩғЩ… ЩҠШ§ШұШЁрҹӨІрҹҸҪ
ЩғЩ„Щ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш¬Щ…Ш№ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш®ЩҠШұЩҠШ© ЩҠШұЩҒШ№ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШЁЩ„Шә 10 ШЈЩ„Ш§ЩҒ Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠШ© Ш№ШҙШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Ші 
Ш§Щ„ЩҠ Щ…Ш§Щ„ШӯЩӮШӘ Ш№Щ„Щү ШЈШ¬Шұ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШёЩҠЩ… ЩҲЩҶШіШ§Ш№ШҜ ШЈЩғШ«Шұ Ш№ШҜШҜ Щ…Щ…ЩғЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ ШЈШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§ 
ЩҲШЈШҙЩӮШ§ШҰЩҶШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ЩҠЩҶрҹҷҸрҹҸҪ 
Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ ЩҠШӯЩҒШёЩҮЩ… ЩҲЩҠШ№ЩҠЩҶЩҮЩ… ЩҲЩҠШұШІЩӮЩҮЩ… Щ…ЩҶ ЩҲШ§ШіШ№ ЩҒШ¶Щ„ЩҮрҹӨІрҹҸҪ 

ШҙЩғШұШ§ЩӢ Щ„Щғ ЩҠШ§ ЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш®ЩҠШұрҹҢ№ЩҲШӘШ°ЩғШұ Щ…Ш§ ЩҶЩӮШө Щ…Ш§Щ„ Ш№ШЁШҜ Щ…ЩҶ ШөШҜЩӮШ©рҹҢә


ШұШ§Шӯ Ш§ШҙШұШӯ Ш№ЩҶ ЩғЩҠЩҒЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ШұЩғ ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬ЩҲШ§ШҰШІ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§ШіШӘЩҲШұЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҶШіШӘЩӮШұШ§Щ… ШЁШҘШ°ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ

ЩҲ Ш№Щ„Щү ШҘЩҠШҜЩҠШ§ Щ…ШұШЁЩҠЩҮШ§
рҹҺ¶рҹҺ¶рҹҺ¶рҹҺ¶рҹҺ¶рҹҺ¶рҹҺ¶рҹҺ¶ 
ЩҠШ§ Ш№ШҙЩҠШұШӘЩҠ Щ…Ш§ ШӘШҜШұЩҠШҙЩҠ Щ…ЩҶ ШЁШ№ШҜЩғ ЩҲШ§Шҙ Ш¬ШұШ§Щ„ЩҠ
ШҜШ§ШұЩҲ Ш№Щ„ЩҠШ§ Ш§Щ„ШҙЩ…Ш§ШӘЩҮ Ш®Щ„ЩҲЩҶЩҠ ШұШ§ЩҶЩҠ ЩҒШӯШ§Щ„ЩҠ
Щ…Щ„ЪӨЩҠШӘ Щ„ШҙЩғЩҲЩҶ ЩҶШӯЩғЩҠ ЩҮЩ…ЩҠ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШҙЩғЩҲЩү Щ„ШұШЁЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„ЩҠ 
ЩҶЩғШӘШЁЩҮШ§ ЩҲЩҶШәЩҶЩҠЩҮШ§ ШӘЩҲШӯШҙШӘЩғ ЩҠЩ„ЩҠ ЩҒШЁШ§Щ„ЩҠ
ЩҶЩғШӘШЁЩҮШ§ ЩҲЩҶШәЩҶЩҠЩҮШ§ ШӘЩҲШӯШҙШӘЩғ ЩҠЩ„ЩҠ ЩҒШЁШ§Щ„ЩҠ

snippet.title: I Spent 100 Hours Customizing The World's Largest PS5 ($70,000)
snippet.description:
I can't believe we spent 100 hours customizing the world's largest Playstation 5 and gave PS5's away to subscribers lol

Hope you enjoyed! Subscribe right now and you'll be a part of the giveaways! Thanks for watching :)

If you're not yet subscribed, I promise you won't regret subscribing! If you're already subscribed, I love you! вқӨпёҸ
Subscribe and you might be picked to be in my next video! It's free and it would genuinely make me super happy if you subscribed! рҹҘә

Subscribe to all our channels!
ZHC Crafts: @ZHC Crafts 
ZHC Shorts: @ZHC Shorts 
MsMunchie: @MsMunchie 

This PS5 is 10 feet tall (3 meters) weighs 500 pounds (227 kilograms) and cost me $70,000 in total! This playstation 5 is insane! We spent over 4 months putting together this video for you!

Follow my socials too!
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/zhc
Twitter - https://twitter.com/zhc_yt
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/ZHC/

If you scrolled till the end... i luv u рҹҘәвқӨпёҸ
